ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the team member is involved in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the meeting is for */,
  "meeting_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the meeting */,
  "facilitator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting facilitator */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting is held */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the meeting */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of the meeting (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the meeting was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the meeting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_facilitator_id FOREIGN KEY ("facilitator_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team member attended the meeting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendance was recorded */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendance_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting where the task was assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member to whom the task is assigned */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the task */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date for the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback related to the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_status_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting where the material was shared */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the material file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who uploaded the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_materials_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_materials_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback related to the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)
